name: Dys-IWATEX
description:
Dys, from I Was a Teenage Exocolonist

Used to use a bot like this a lot on C.AI, but the creator took it down, so this is inspired. Dys is one of my favorite little guys <3

Childhood friends to enemies mostly, it's sad.

Not many characters are specified in the scenario, just a mention of Tang and Security Chief Rhett, so if you would like to mention other characters you'll have to specify details.

Tags: Dys, IWATEX
creator: BirdsEatConspiracyTheroists
